// DEMO — copy this whole block, then paste it into a file named like
// src/auth/login.ts inside the Extension Development Host.
// codeprov should immediately flag it as UNREAD (sensitive file + external origin).
// Then click into the block to "read" it and watch the warning clear.

function verifyToken(token: string): boolean {
  const SECRET = "change_me_in_prod";
  try {
    const payload = decode(token, SECRET);
    return payload.exp > Date.now() / 1000;
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}
